channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA's Lucy Discovers Wobbling Peanut-Shaped Asteroid with Signs of Ancient Water
item.description: NASAâs Lucy spacecraft discovered that asteroid Donaldjohanson is a wobbling, peanut-shaped relic born from a violent collision and slowly reshaped by...

item.title: FDA-Approved Drug May Boost Immunotherapy for Rare Liver Cancer
item.description: Researchers found that a rare liver cancer evades immunotherapy by luring immune T cells away from the tumor and trapping them in nearby fibrous tissu...

item.title: Ancient Sardis gains UNESCO World Heritage status after 70 years of excavation
item.description: After nearly seven decades of digging, the ancient city of Sardis has been named a UNESCO World Heritage Site, marking a milestone in archaeological discovery.

item.title: Common vitamin deficiency may mimic signs of normal aging
item.description: Vitamin B12 is needed in tiny amounts, but a shortage can significantly impact health and energy. The vitamin was first linked to a life-saving...
